title: Intel Share Price: Riding the AI Boom
description: Intel's share price has jumped 11% as the chipmaker experiences its fastest revenue growth in nearly 15 years, fueled by the AI boom.

sources.title: Intel's stock jumps 11% as chipmaker rides AI boom to fastest revenue growth in almost 15 years
Intel results to test AI-fuelled rally as turnaround faces margin, demand challenges
Intel Q2 2026 earnings: revenue up 25%, fastest growth since 2011

sections.heading: Earnings Report
paragraphs: According to Quartz, Intel reported a 25% increase in revenue for Q2 2026, marking the fastest growth since 2011.

sections.heading: Market Reaction
paragraphs: CNBC reports that Intel's stock jumped 11% following the earnings report.

sections.heading: AI Boom Impact
paragraphs: The AI boom is credited for Intel's significant revenue growth, as stated by both CNBC and Quartz.

sections.heading: Challenges
paragraphs: ETEnterpriseai.com discusses the challenges Intel faces, including margin pressures and lagging PC demand, despite the AI-driven revenue surge.

faq.q: What was Intel's Q2 2026 revenue growth?
faq.a: According to Quartz, Intel's Q2 2026 revenue grew by 25%, the fastest growth since 2011.

faq.q: How did Intel's share price react to the earnings report?
faq.a: CNBC reports that Intel's stock jumped 11% following the earnings report.

faq.q: What is contributing to Intel's revenue growth?
faq.a: The AI boom is credited for Intel's significant revenue growth, as stated by both CNBC and Quartz.

faq.q: What challenges does Intel face despite the growth?
faq.a: ETEnterpriseai.com discusses challenges such as margin pressures and lagging PC demand.
